productDisplayName: Fila Men Trofeo White Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Pared down to the basic and updated with innovative style details, this fila Trofeo shoe is a season closet essential. Add a refined twist to your casual wardrobe staples with this well-defined shoe. Product Details Round toed white shoe with mesh inner and central lace-ups Padded mesh inner Running Lite midsole upraised at the heel TPU outsole with Motion Control technology, waffle patterned lugs and nubs Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner and polish or wax on leather parts Do not store in direct sunlight
